headline: 5 Stocks With High ROE to Buy as Iran War Crisis Refuses to Abate
summary: ROST, GL, AVGO, GLW and STZ emerge as defensive plays as Iran war tensions lift oil prices and rattle markets, spotlighting cash-efficient stocks.

headline: Constellation Brands buys Hopwtr, expands nonalcoholic portfolio
summary: Hop water’s functional benefits may make it a growth driver within booze-free beverages, though it makes up a small portion of the market.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog  Duke Energy, Entergy, Constellation Brands, Coca-Cola and Johnson & Johnson
summary: KO and other defensive picks stand out as market volatility spikes, with dividends, low beta, and steady growth offering a buffer in a turbulent Wall Street.
